title: WP admin / block icon
description: Accepted forms for `menu_icon` (CPT JSON) and `icon` (block.json). Reject Python repr / arbitrary strings.

oneOf.description: WordPress Dashicons class — admin menu, block inserter sidebar.
Inline SVG markup. For block.json icon, must additionally contain 'currentColor' (enforced by block.schema.json extension).
'none' disables the icon; '' uses WP default.
HTTPS URL to an external icon — discouraged (latency, CSP, no theming). Allowed for backward compatibility with legacy projects.
ACF Pro 6.x icon-picker object. `type` selects the source; `value` is a dashicon class, an attachment ID (media_library), or a URL. ACF's post-type class reads both the string and object forms.
